summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Chat Safety Trainer app. All backend APIs and frontend flows working perfectly. The critical AttributeError bug from iteration_1 has been completely resolved.
passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
POST /api/start-chat works for both social_media and gaming platforms
POST /api/send-message works correctly with AI responses and safety analysis
POST /api/end-chat works with all three actions: block, report, end
Platform selection screen loads and both cards are clickable
Chat screen loads with initial bot messages
Message sending and receiving with AI responses (5-10 second response time)
Safety analysis panel shows/hides correctly with detailed analysis
All action buttons (Block, Report, End) work and lead to result screen
Result screen displays proper feedback, scores, and bot truth
Try Another Scenario button returns to platform selection
Full end-to-end user flows for both platforms work seamlessly
